title: Recovery After 40
subtitle: What actually changes, what doesn't, and how to recover when you're not 25 anymore
author: Nate Ratcliff, LMT
license: For Healing Hands By Nate Inner Circle members. Personal use only. Please don't redistribute — share the membership instead.
description: A practical field guide for bodies that aren't 25 anymore. Not a doom-and-gloom lecture — honest answers about what's different and what's the same.
